overrides.hero_title: Free school meals: what's changing in Oxfordshire
overrides.hero_subtitle: Important news for parents and carers
overrides.intro_html: From September 2026, every child whose family receives Universal Credit can get free school meals.
overrides.cta_primary_title: Apply by end of summer term
overrides.cta_primary_body_html: Oxfordshire processes applications over the summer so your child is ready for free meals on the first day of the Autumn term.
overrides.box1_title: If your child currently gets free school meals
overrides.box1_body_html: From the 2026/27 school year, eligibility will be checked every year. Oxfordshire is exploring auto-enrolment — look out for a letter from us, and contact your school if you don't hear by the start of term.
overrides.box2_title: If you receive Universal Credit but haven't claimed before
overrides.box2_body_html: Your child is now eligible. Apply through your school by the end of the summer term. Full details: schools.oxfordshire.gov.uk.
overrides.how_to_steps_html:
• Apply at schools.oxfordshire.gov.uk
  • Or download the form from your school's website
  • Or pick up a paper copy from the school office
overrides.cta_secondary_body_html: You may still be entitled. Use Oxfordshire's free benefit calculator to check if you could qualify for Universal Credit and free school meals.
